description: User reviews the list of available inbound flights and their prices, comparing options from Melbourne to Adelaide.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel
frame_description: The user is viewing flight search results with various Virgin Australia and Jetstar options.

description: User clicks the $177 price button for the 12:10pm Virgin Australia flight.
The 'Select Returning Fare Type' modal window appears, presenting Lite, Choice, and Flex options.
User selects a fare option from the modal to proceed with the booking.
An 'All Set!' loading overlay appears with a progress spinner while the flight selection is processed.
